meta.tagline: Enterprise software for institutions, healthcare, and businesses.

home.heroTitle: Software that moves your business forward
home.heroSubtitle: From hospital management to e-commerce websites — built by a team that actually ships.
home.trustStrip: Trusted by 50+ teams · Pakistan · UAE · UK · USA

footer.brandDesc: Websites, portals, CRMs, and marketing — engineered for businesses worldwide.

templates.metaDescription: Browse our complete library of website templates. Every industry, every style. Click any template for a live preview, then start your project in minutes.
templates.heroSubtitle: Pick a starting point. Every template ships with a working homepage and supporting pages — we customize the rest.
templates.footerHintCta: Tell us what you want — we'll build it

service.featuresSubtitle: Built-in features that cover every workflow out of the box.
service.pricingSubtitle: No hidden fees. Cancel or upgrade any time.
service.planWhatsappMessage: Hi, I'd like to know more about the {plan} plan for {service}
service.ctaReadySubtitle: Message us on WhatsApp and we'll have you up and running within days, not months.

webdev.heroSubtitle: No templates to fight. No subscriptions forever. No freelancer who vanishes. Just a team that builds it, launches it, and stays.
webdev.templatesSubtitle: Every industry. Every style. Click to preview live.
webdev.modalStickyCta: Use This Template — Get Your Website

webPricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
webPricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. All plans include brand-oriented design with colour psychology principles.
webPricing.ecommerceNote: E-commerce functionality: +{amount} added to development cost
webPricing.supportNote: Starter plan includes 3 months of free adjustments after delivery. Growth and Professional plans include continuous support and updates for as long as you're subscribed.

order.pickPlanSub: Choose what fits — you can upgrade anytime later.
